briefdescription.para: Size of SMAP width pattern.
Size of bootheader without padding.
Size of bootheader.
Size of Image Header Table.
Mask for signed image in bootheader.
RSA 4096 key size.
Size of Secondary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Primary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of SPK signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Bootheader signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Partition signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Authentication header(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of User Data(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.

memberdef.name: XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_MIN_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: (XLOADER_AUTH_HEADER_SIZE \ + XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_USER_DATA \ + XLOADER_PPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIG_SIZE \ + 8U \ + XLOADER_BHDR_SIG_SIZE \ + XLOADER_PARTITION_SIG_SIZE)

briefdescription.para: Minimum Size of Authentication Certificate(in bytes)
Max number of partitions.
Length of SHA3 Hash in bytes.
Length of word in bytes.
Shift to convert word in bytes.
Size of partition in bytes.
Optional data id mask.
Optional data length mask.
shift value to extract optional data length
Optional data length offset.
Default optional data length.
Optional data id for hash table.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 PrtnAddr, u32 PrtnLen, u32 PrtnIdx, u64 ACAddr, XilPdi_HashTblInfo *HashTblInfo)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies signature for each partition.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where partition is present
- Length of partition
- Index of the partition
- Address where Authentication Certificate of partition is present
- Pointer to Hash Table Information

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 HashAddr, u64 ACAddr, u32 SignatureSelect)
memberdef.name: XLoader_VerifyDataAuth

briefdescription.para: This function fills payload and sends IPI request for verifying signature for the provided hash.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where hash is present
- Address where authentication certificate is present

- To select signature in authentication certificate
TRUE - Header signature
FALSE - Image signature

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate Boot Header, PLM and PMC CDO authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Pointer to Meta Header Offset

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u64 MhOffset, const u32 PrtnStartIdx)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidateMhAndPrtnAuth

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate Meta Header and partition authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Offset where meta header is present
- Partition start offset i.e. 0 for PPDI and 1 for Full PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function calculates hash and verifies signature for each partition.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Address where bootheader is present

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function search offset of optional data address.

parameterdescription.para: is start address of IHT optional data
is end address of IHT optional data
is to identify type of data in data structure

listitem.para: Offset on getting successful optional data offset address for given data Id.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether Partition hash is present or not and compares the claculated hash with hash which is present in IHT Optional data for the respective partitions.

parameterdescription.para: is Address fo the calculated Hash
is pointer to Hash table info
is index of partition hash in IHT optional data

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to configure jtag status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
To enable / disable jtag.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE on failure.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ConfigureJtagState CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DDR crypto performance counters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance.
DDR device id.
To read DDR crypto counters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE on failure.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.
Perform input parameters validation. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XLoader_ReadDdrCryptoPerfCounters CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether Authentication optimization is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is start address of IHT optional data
is size of IHT optional data
is pointer to XilPdi_HashTblInfo

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS On Success
XST_FAILURE On Failure

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PdiAddr, const u32 PdiType)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ValidatePdiAuth

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate authenticated PDI based on PDI type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
Address where authenticated PDI is present
Value to indicate full or partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: This function has external linkage and is declared in xloader_plat_client.h for use by application code.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XLoader_ClientInstance
- Address where authenticated PDI is present
- Value to indicate Full or Partial PDI

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: For full PDI Partition 0 is PLM. Hence Idx starts from 1 for PLM loadable partitions
